name: infoblox-ddi-mcp
description: MCP connector for Infoblox DDI. Provides DNS and Grid Member queries.

tools.name: list_zones
tools.description: List all DNS zones from Infoblox.

tools.name: list_records
tools.description: List DNS records from a specific zone.

tools.name: list_grid_members
tools.description: Return information about Infoblox grid members.

tools.name: search_dns_record
tools.description: Search DNS A records by IP address, host name, or FQDN.

tools.name: check_ip_usage
tools.description: Check whether an IP address is currently used by DNS A records.

tools.name: get_zone_summary
tools.description: Get a summary of DNS records in a zone.

tools.name: get_grid_status
tools.description: Get the status of all grid members, including VIP settings and service status.

tools.name: get_dns_overview
tools.description: Get an overview of the DNS environment, including zones, record counts, and grid member statuses.
